text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly over 24 hours, with Ethereum's 3.1% decline outpacing Bitcoin's 2.1%, suggesting weakening conviction in altcoins relative to the largest asset. The Fear & Greed Index at 12 reflects extreme fear, reinforced by a negative 7-day trend, indicating capitulation-level sentiment among retail participants. At 55.8% BTC dominance with $98B in daily volume, the market is contracting into Bitcoin as a safe harbor, though volume remains subdued relative to panic episodes, suggesting some traders may be waiting on the sidelines.
